title: PCM Research Thesis
description: Began M.Tech-level research thesis on electrothermal simulation of Phase Change Memory (PCM) devices in COMSOL Multiphysics at RSET.

title: Noviq — Web & AI Studio
description: Founded Noviq, a web development studio in Kochi building websites, Flutter apps, and AI-powered chatbots for local businesses.

title: Firmware Developer — ASAT (US Startup)
description: Remote firmware internship developing BLE Peripheral firmware on nRF5340 DK using Zephyr RTOS and nRF Connect SDK.

title: VirtusCo — Co-founder & CTO
description: Co-founded VirtusCo to build Virtus, an autonomous B2B airport luggage porter robot. Built full ROS 2 Jazzy stack from scratch on RPi 5. IEDC incubated.

title: Freelance ROS 2 Developer — Fiverr
description: Started providing ROS 2 package development and code review services to international clients on Fiverr.

title: Award of Appreciation — RSET
description: Recognised for contributions to the Robo-Based Mobile Sensing System for Indoor Air Flow Measurement (KULIRMA Fan project).

title: MAP-NEO: 253M Parameter LLM
description: Built and trained a 253M-parameter transformer from scratch using RMSNorm, RoPE, SwiGLU, and Flash Attention on RTX 5070. Published on HuggingFace.

title: Apptronics Event Coordinator
description: Coordinating science and technology events at RSET's Apptronics technical fest.

title: Engineer Intern — Roots Industries
description: Industrial exposure to end-to-end manufacturing workflows at Roots Industries India Limited, Coimbatore.

title: Podium Finish — Electric ATV Competition
description: Competed against 12 colleges at Saintgits College; showcased expertise in embedded systems and motor control.

title: Industrial Trainee — KEALCO
description: Assembled, wound, and tested high-voltage step-down power transformers at Kerala Electrical and Allied Engineering Co.

title: Started B.Tech at RSET
description: Began Bachelor of Technology in Applied Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering at Rajagiri School of Engineering & Technology.

title: Freelance Web Developer
description: Started developing responsive production websites using Next.js for international clients including Yehi (Australia) and VirtusCo.

title: Higher Secondary Completion
description: Completed Higher Secondary Education with specialization in Electronics, C, C++, and Python at Model Technical HSS.

title: Head of Electronics Club
description: Led three batches of 15 students in electronics and embedded systems projects over 4 years at Model Technical HSS.

title: Top Performer — K.I.T.E. Training
description: Top performer in technical training and educational initiatives under Kerala Infrastructure and Technology for Education.

title: Robotics Intern — Srishti Robotics
description: Foundational embedded systems internship: Arduino, ESP8266/ESP32, sensors, IoT frameworks. Recognised as Best Performer.
